label: Euler Characteristic chi_eff = 144
mathematical_goal: Derive chi_eff = 144 from TCS #187 Hodge numbers via canonical formula chi_eff = 2(h11 - h21 + h31), cross-checked against shortcut chi_eff = 6*b3
theoretical_significance: The effective Euler characteristic chi_eff = 144 is the total manifold topological invariant (both shadows: 72 + 72 = 144). For TCS #187: chi_eff = 2*(4 - 0 + 68) = 144. Equivalently chi_eff = 6*b3 = 6*24 = 144. This determines fermion generations via n_gen = chi_eff/48 = 3 (Acharya 2002, Atiyah-Singer index theorem).

geometry.interpretation: Effective chiral index from Hodge numbers of TCS G2 manifold
